response.justification: Bogdan has strong general software engineering skills and exposure to AI-agent infrastructure, but lacks the specific requirements for this role. His experience is primarily in web/mobile development, embedded systems, and some distributed systems work, but there is no clear evidence of production-scale multi-agent AI systems, fintech regulatory compliance, or leadership in scaling engineering teams in regulated environments. His recent roles focus on full-stack and AI-agent tooling rather than core agentic AI architecture or fintech infrastructure.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering background with experience in distributed systems and real-time processing
Contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP, agentic workflows) at re:cinq
Proven ability to design and maintain event-driven systems (GISCollective, microservices)
concerns: No demonstrable experience with fintech systems, credit risk, or regulatory compliance in a commercial setting
Limited evidence of leadership in scaling engineering teams beyond 10-20 people or developing senior technical leadership layers
No clear track record of operating AI systems in high-stakes commercial environments with financial consequences
